Label: UX Validation Complete
GO Definition: Validation plan executed per Impact Level: internal product user sessions (3-5) and external representative user sessions (5-8 for Impact 1-2) and customer sessions (Impact 1) completed with findings documented and applied
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Validation partially complete: some required sessions not yet conducted. Mitigation plan documented with timeline.
NO GO Definition: Required validation has not been performed for this Impact Level

Label: UX Preview Validated
GO Definition: UX and Product Education have reviewed changes in UX Preview production group. Both signed off on visual accuracy and interaction quality and documentation needs.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Preview available but one or more sign-offs still pending. Issues identified with clear resolution plan.
NO GO Definition: No UX Preview group configured or reviews not started

Label: Behavioral Baseline Established
GO Definition: Baseline Pendo/usage metrics captured for all affected workflows. Pre-launch snapshot documented with defined comparison criteria for post-launch analysis.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Baseline partially captured: some metrics still being instrumented or historical data gaps identified with workaround plan.
NO GO Definition: No behavioral baseline established for affected workflows

Label: Feature Gate Readiness
GO Definition: Feature gate implemented and tested. Rollback verified in staging with under 30 minute recovery time. Gate controls validated for all cohort groups (Internal and Cohort 1 and Cohort 2).
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Feature gate implemented but rollback procedure not yet tested end-to-end. Gate configuration documented.
NO GO Definition: No feature gate implemented for an Impact 1-2 change or gate exists but has not been validated

Label: Rollback Plan Ready
GO Definition: Rollback plan documented and tested: detection (under 15 min) then assessment (confirm rollout-related) then feature gate disable (under 30 min) then stakeholder communication (under 1 hour). Communication template prepared.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Rollback plan documented but not yet tested end-to-end. Stakeholder communication template in draft.
NO GO Definition: No rollback plan exists or rollback mechanism has not been identified

Label: In-App Education Deployed
GO Definition: Pendo guides deployed per Impact Level: full onboarding experience (Impact 1) or guided walkthroughs (Impact 2) or contextual guidance (Impact 3). Accessibility reviewed. Linked to Zendesk articles where applicable.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Pendo guides drafted and in review but not yet deployed to production or accessibility review pending. Zendesk article updates in progress.
NO GO Definition: Required Pendo guides not created or guides fail accessibility/plain-language review or no education assets for an Impact 1-3 change

Label: Customer Communication Plan Executed
GO Definition: All required customer communications sent per Impact Level timeline: advance email (Impact 2: 2-4 weeks / Impact 1: 18+ weeks) and CSM strategic account outreach completed (Impact 1) and reminder and training resource emails sent.
CONDITIONAL GO Definition: Communication plan exists and is on track but some communications still pending or minor timeline delays with clear catch-up plan.
NO GO Definition: No customer communication plan for an Impact 1-2 change or significantly behind required timeline with no mitigation
